title: Da Website
text:
Species

ggplot(
  penguins,  aes( x= bill_length_mm, y= bill_depth_mm, color = species, shape = species)) +
  geom_point() + theme_minimal() + labs(x = "Bill Length mm", 
          y = "Bill Depth mm")
